recommended_action: route to curmudgeon queue, hold integration until clear, integrate after curmudgeon clears (no operator approval gate per HNOTE-001 + HNOTE-OPERATOR-PHASE-B-DRAIN-PRIORITY-003)
summary: Phase B3 prefix unification: every Phase A1 component class renamed to ds-* prefix via a smoke-tested rename script (516 valid replacements across generate-html.js + sections.json + wins.json + test.js; zero false positives; two expected residuals in test.js regex literals covered by TEST_JS_PATCHES table). Verdict tokens (vb-/vt-/vl-/v-/tag-) preserved per HNOTE scope. ps-/ks- progressive-disclosure scaffold preserved per HNOTE rule. Decision: PREPEND ds- (not REPLACE) — preserves component sub-namespaces, lowest-risk 1:1 rename, matches operator phrasing of 'a single design-system prefix'. The rename script self-verifies with a class-name-aware boundary regex (NOT \b — that falsely matches inside ds-tab-content because of hyphens) and exits 0 only when zero unexpected residuals remain.
